fields.name: reportId
fields.description: Unique identifier for this scam/fraud report, assigned by the originating system

fields.name: reportDate
fields.description: Timestamp when the report was created and submitted to risk and compliance

fields.name: sourceDeployment
fields.description: The originating system that generated and sent this report

fields.name: targetDeployment
fields.description: The receiving system responsible for investigation and compliance action

fields.name: reportType
fields.description: Classification of the report as scam or fraud incident

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Risk severity level assigned to this incident

fields.name: incident
fields.description: Core details of the detected fraud or scam incident

children.name: incidentId
children.description: Unique identifier for the incident within the customer services system

children.name: incidentType
children.description: Specific category of fraud or scam detected

children.name: detectionDate
children.description: Timestamp when the incident was first detected by the system or staff

children.name: reportedByStaffId
children.description: Employee identifier of the staff member who reported the incident

children.name: reportedByName
children.description: Full name of the staff member who reported the incident

fields.name: customer
fields.description: Information about the customer affected by the fraud incident

children.name: customerId
children.description: Unique identifier for the affected customer

children.name: customerName
children.description: Full name of the affected customer

children.name: accountNumber
children.description: Masked account number of the affected customer account; last four digits visible for identification

children.name: customerTier
children.description: Customer segmentation tier indicating service level or relationship status

fields.name: fraudDetails
fields.description: Detailed information about the fraudulent transaction and scheme

children.name: fraudDescription
children.description: Narrative description of the fraud scheme and method used

children.name: amountInvolved
children.description: Monetary amount of the fraudulent transaction

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the transaction amount

children.name: transactionReference
children.description: Unique reference identifier for the fraudulent transaction

children.name: fraudulentRecipient
children.description: Description or identifier of the recipient account or entity receiving the fraudulent funds

children.name: recipientCountry
children.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the fraudulent recipient's location

children.name: transactionStatus
children.description: Current status of the fraudulent transaction

fields.name: riskIndicators
fields.description: List of risk signals or anomalies that triggered or supported fraud detection

children.name: indicator
children.description: Individual risk indicator or anomaly code

fields.name: actionsTaken
fields.description: List of protective or investigative actions executed in response to the fraud incident

children.name: action
children.description: Individual action taken to mitigate or investigate the fraud

fields.name: additionalNotes
fields.description: Free-text narrative providing context, evidence, or supplementary details about the incident

fields.name: escalationRequired
fields.description: Flag indicating whether the incident requires escalation to risk and compliance for further investigation

fields.name: documentationRef
fields.description: Reference identifier for supporting documentation or case file associated with this report
